name: google-tasks
description: Google Tasks. Shares the google-oauth credential with google-sheets.

marketplace.tagline: Create, update, and complete Google Tasks from agent workflows.
useCases: Create tasks from emails, issues, or agent observations
Mark tasks complete and clear finished items on a schedule
Sync a task list to a sheet or report
marketplace.permissionsSummary: Read, create, update, complete, and delete Google Tasks via OAuth.
